### ♿ UX & Accessibility Checklist
- [ ] **Semantic HTML:** Appropriate elements used.
- [ ] **Keyboard Nav:** Interactive elements reachable.
- [ ] **ARIA Labels:** Added to icon-only components.
- [ ] **Color Contrast:** Meets WCAG guidelines.
- [ ] **Focus States:** Clear visual indicators.
- [ ] **Responsiveness:** Works across screen sizes.
